page_content:
## Finalized Summary of Accomplishments (The "Brag Sheet")  
_Attach this as a separate PDF titled "Arian_Moridani_Project_Summary.pdf" to each email._  
- **Clinical Commitment:** Balancing 25–30 hours per week as a **Pharmacy Technician at Walgreens**, managing insurance adjudication and inventory. Additionally, serving as an **ICU Volunteer at Medical City Frisco** (building on 100+ hours at Medical City Denton), providing critical support in high-acuity environments.  
- **Graduate Academic Excellence:** Currently pursuing a **Master of Science in Computer Science** at **Georgia Tech** (3.14 GPA), specializing in **Machine Learning** to bridge the gap between engineering and clinical care.  
- **Deep Learning Pipeline Optimization:** Engineered a high-performance deep learning pipeline for geometric data analysis, utilizing algorithmic efficiency to reduce end-to-end training and inference time by **90%** (from 5 hours to 30 minutes).  
- **Neural Network Accuracy:** Constructed a multi-layer neural network in **PyTorch** for multi-class classification on a 10,000-record dataset, achieving a **95% predictive accuracy** through systematic grid search and hyperparameter tuning.  
- **Biomedical Engineering & Publication:** Co-authored two publications, including research on **Thermo-Active Variable Impedance Modules (TVIM)**. Previously led a senior design team to fabricate a low-cost, silicone-molded aortic valve replacement, reducing unit costs from **$10,000 to $500**.  
---
